description: Install dependencies and verify the project baseline is green before making documentation changes
steps: Run `npm ci` to install all project dependencies
Run `unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx jest --no-coverage` to confirm all existing tests pass
Run `npx cdk synth --context environment=dev` to confirm CDK synthesis succeeds
acceptance_criteria: All existing Jest tests pass without failures
CDK synthesis produces valid CloudFormation output
findings: All 196 tests pass across 4 test suites. CDK synth succeeds. Snapshot needed update due to Lambda asset hash change (content hash drift). Must unset NODE_OPTIONS before running npm or jest commands.
